description.en: The Turn-A Assist Blade in Attack mode. A Custom Line Assist Blade with a reversible outer piece; in this mode the contact points have additional protrusions for rapid barrage attacks.
description.de: The Turn-A Assist Blade in Attack mode. A Custom Line Assist Blade with a reversible outer piece; in this mode the contact points have additional protrusions for rapid barrage attacks.

assessment.en: Turn-A places the Turn Assist Blade in Attack mode. The exposed protrusions create barrage-attack potential, but the shape still keeps some defensive utility. Weight: 5.8g. Ratings estimated from official stats and mode.
assessment.de: Turn-A places the Turn Assist Blade in Angriff mode. The exposed protrusions create barrage-attack potential, but the shape still keeps some defensive utility. Gewicht: 5.8g. Ratings estimated from official stats and mode.

description.en: The Turn-D Assist Blade in Defense mode. A Custom Line Assist Blade with a reversible outer piece; in this mode the contact points are smoother to deflect opposing attacks.
description.de: The Turn-D Assist Blade in Defense mode. A Custom Line Assist Blade with a reversible outer piece; in this mode the contact points are smoother to deflect opposing attacks.

assessment.en: Turn-D places the Turn Assist Blade in Defense mode. The smoother contact points improve deflection and stability at the cost of aggression. Weight: 5.8g. Ratings estimated from official stats and mode.
assessment.de: Turn-D places the Turn Assist Blade in Verteidigung mode. The smoother contact points improve deflection and stability at the cost of aggression. Gewicht: 5.8g. Ratings estimated from official stats and mode.

assessment.de: Charge ist ein rechtsdrehender Defense-Typ Assist Blade. Gewicht: 5g. Höhe: 60mm. Hergestellt von Takara Tomy.

description.en: Jaggy is a low right-spin Attack Type Assist Blade from the Custom Line. It debuted in the CX-06 Random Booster FoxBrush Select as part of Fox Brush J9-70GR. At just 50mm tall and 4.9g, it is one of the lighter Assist Blades, built to extend and sharpen the main contact points of an Attack Blade without adding much mass or drag.
description.de: Jaggy ist ein niedriger, rechtsdrehender Attack-Type-Assist-Blade aus der Custom Line. Es debütierte im CX-06 Random Booster FoxBrush Select als Teil von Fox Brush J9-70GR. Mit nur 50mm Höhe und 4,9g gehört es zu den leichteren Assist Blades und wurde entwickelt, um die Hauptkontaktpunkte eines Attack-Blades zu verlängern und zu schärfen, ohne viel Masse oder Widerstand hinzuzufügen.

assessment.en: Jaggy's jagged edges sit below the Main Blade and add extra scraping, lifting contact points that help Upper Attack and Xtreme Dash activation. Its light weight keeps the combo fast, but it offers little defensive stability or stamina. It pairs best with aggressive Main Blades that already have strong slopes, such as Brave, where it can turn a smooth upper-attack shape into a more threatening contact profile. BeyBase lists 4.9g and 50mm; ratings follow the Attack Type bias.
assessment.de: Jaggys gezackte Kanten sitzen unterhalb des Main Blades und fügen zusätzliche schaufelnde, anhebende Kontaktpunkte hinzu, die Upper Attack und Xtreme-Dash-Aktivierung unterstützen. Sein geringes Gewicht hält das Combo schnell, bietet aber kaum defensive Stabilität oder Ausdauer. Es harmoniert am besten mit aggressiven Main Blades, die bereits starke Neigungen aufweisen, wie Brave, wo es eine glatte Upper-Attack-Form in ein bedrohlicheres Kontaktprofil verwandeln kann. BeyBase nennt 4,9g und 50mm; die Bewertungen folgen der Attack-Type-Neigung.

assessment.en: Assault is a right-spin Attack Type Assist Blade. Weight: 5g. Height: 60mm. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.
assessment.de: Assault ist ein rechtsdrehender Attack-Typ Assist Blade. Gewicht: 5g. Höhe: 60mm. Hergestellt von Takara Tomy.

assessment.en: Wheel is a right-spin Stamina Type Assist Blade. Weight: 7.2g. Height: 80mm. Manufactured by Takara Tomy.
assessment.de: Wheel ist ein rechtsdrehender Stamina-Typ Assist Blade. Gewicht: 7.2g. Höhe: 80mm. Hergestellt von Takara Tomy.

description.en: Massive is a right-spin Balance Type Assist Blade from the Custom Line. It debuted in the CX-08 Random Booster Vol. 7 as part of WhaleFlame M3-85HT and was later reused in PegasusBrush M3-85W. Its 5.3g weight and 60mm height give it a mid-sized, rounded profile designed to add stability and contact surface without dominating the combo's behavior.
description.de: Massive ist ein rechtsdrehender Balance-Type-Assist-Blade aus der Custom Line. Es debütierte im CX-08 Random Booster Vol. 7 als Teil von WhaleFlame M3-85HT und wurde später in PegasusBrush M3-85W wiederverwendet. Sein 5,3g-Gewicht und seine 60mm Höhe verleihen ihm ein mittelgroßes, rundes Profil, das Stabilität und Kontaktfläche hinzufügen soll, ohne das Verhalten des Combos zu dominieren.

assessment.en: Massive sits in the middle of the Assist Blade spectrum: not as aggressive as Jaggy or Assault, not as defensive as Bumper or Wheel. Its rounded shape adds a small amount of stability and extra contact points, but the 5.3g weight is too light to turn a combo defensive on its own. It pairs best with lightweight Main Blades like Brush, where it can round out the contact profile without dragging down speed. No deep community testing is available, so ratings are estimated from its stats and role.
assessment.de: Massive sitzt in der Mitte des Assist-Blade-Spektrums: nicht so aggressiv wie Jaggy oder Assault, nicht so defensiv wie Bumper oder Wheel. Seine runde Form fügt eine kleine Menge Stabilität und zusätzliche Kontaktpunkte hinzu, aber das 5,3g-Gewicht ist zu leicht, um ein Combo allein defensiv zu machen. Es harmoniert am besten mit leichten Main Blades wie Brush, wo es das Kontaktprofil abrunden kann, ohne die Geschwindigkeit zu bremsen. Da keine tiefgreifenden Community-Tests verfügbar sind, sind die Bewertungen anhand seiner Werte und Rolle geschätzt.

description.en: The Dual-U Assist Blade in Upper mode. A Custom Line Assist Blade with reversible contact points slanting upward to create Upper Attack potential.
description.de: The Dual-U Assist Blade in Upper mode. A Custom Line Assist Blade with reversible contact points slanting upward to create Upper Attack potential.

assessment.en: Dual-U sets Dual to Upper mode. The upward-sloping points can lift opponents and destabilize them, though the effect is subtle. Weight: 5.9g. Ratings estimated from official stats and mode.
assessment.de: Dual-U sets Dual to Upper mode. The upward-sloping points can lift opponents and destabilize them, though the effect is subtle. Gewicht: 5.9g. Ratings estimated from official stats and mode.

description.en: The Dual-S Assist Blade in Smash mode. A Custom Line Assist Blade with reversible contact points slanting downward to create Smash Attack potential.
description.de: The Dual-S Assist Blade in Smash mode. A Custom Line Assist Blade with reversible contact points slanting downward to create Smash Attack potential.

assessment.en: Dual-S sets Dual to Smash mode. The downward-sloping points focus on hard, direct strikes but increase recoil slightly. Weight: 5.9g. Ratings estimated from official stats and mode.
assessment.de: Dual-S sets Dual to Smash mode. The downward-sloping points focus on hard, direct strikes but increase recoil slightly. Gewicht: 5.9g. Ratings estimated from official stats and mode.

description.en: A right-spin Attack Type Assist Blade from the Custom Line with reversible contact points. It can switch between Upper mode for lifting opponents and Smash mode for direct strikes.
description.de: Ein rechtsdrehender Attack-Typ-Assist-Blade aus der Custom Line mit umkehrbaren Kontaktpunkten. Er kann zwischen Upper-Modus zum Anheben des Gegners und Smash-Modus für direkte Treffer wechseln.

assessment.en: Dual is a versatile Attack-oriented Assist Blade with a mode-change gimmick. Weight: 5.9g. Ratings based on community data.
assessment.de: Dual ist ein versatile Attack-oriented Assist Blade with a mode-change gimmick. Gewicht: 5.9g. Ratings based on community data.

description.en: A right-spin Stamina Type Assist Blade from the Custom Line. It debuted with BrachioWhip OW5-70Nr in the CX-18 Random Booster and features an outer-heavy weight distribution for longer spin times.
description.de: Ein rechtsdrehender Stamina-Typ-Assist-Blade aus der Custom Line. Er debütierte mit BrachioWhip OW5-70Nr im CX-18 Random Booster und verfügt über eine außenlastige Gewichtsverteilung für längere Drehzeiten.

assessment.en: Outer is a Stamina-focused Assist Blade that uses outer weight distribution to improve spin endurance and stability. Detailed competitive data is still limited due to its recent release. Weight estimated: 5.5g. Ratings estimated from type, weight and shape.
assessment.de: Outer ist ein Stamina-focused Assist Blade that uses outer weight distribution to improve spin endurance and stability. Detailed competitive data is still limited due to its recent release. Gewicht estimated: 5.5g. Ratings estimated from type, weight and shape.
